features: The plant-based softgels fit easily into a daily routine, with a vegan, non-GMO formula designed to align with a simple and consistent eye health routine.

At the core of the formula is organic sea buckthorn oil blend. The oil is included to support moisture balance and day-to-day comfort for eyes prone to dryness. Each serving (2 softgels) provides 800 mg fruit oil extract plus 200 mg seed oil.
Sea buckthorn is a naturally rich source of vegan Omega-7. The Omega-7 formula works to support healthy tear production and moisture balance from within as part of long-term daily support.
Take two (2) easy-to-swallow softgels once or twice daily with meals as directed for a simple habit that supports consistency and delivers well-tolerated, moisture support everyday.
ingredients: Eyetamins Sea Berry Eye Health Supplement - 60 Softgels
title: eyetamins® by OPTASE® Eye Comfort™ - 60 Softgels - Eye Doctor Recommended - an Omega-Based Eye Supplement formulated to Support Moisture Balance and Eye Comfort from Within. Plant Based Soft gels.
